g.title: gmin_stepping->source_stepping
g.text: Gmin stepping failed, try source stepping

g.title: niiter_check_uic_bypass->niiter_uic_single_load
g.text: UIC bypass: single load, no iteration

g.title: cktload_devices->apply_nodesets_and_ics
g.text: DC mode: apply nodesets/ICs after device load

g.title: lu_factorize_numerical->clear_noncon_and_load
g.text: Singular: set NISHOULDREORDER, retry from top of ...

g.title: check_initf_and_transition->transition_jct_to_fix
g.text: Junction init done, switch to fix mode

g.title: check_initf_and_transition->transition_fix_to_float
g.text: Fix mode converged, switch to float

g.title: check_initf_and_transition->transition_tran_to_float
g.text: First tran iteration done, switch to float

g.title: check_initf_and_transition->transition_smsig_to_float
g.text: Small-signal init done, switch to float

g.title: check_initf_and_transition->swap_rhs_vectors
g.text: Not converged in float, iterate again

g.title: check_initf_and_transition->niiter_return_ok
g.text: Converged in float mode -- NR done

g.title: swap_rhs_vectors->clear_noncon_and_load
g.text: Back to top of NR loop

g.title: tran_dcop_converged->tran_init_state_vectors
g.text: Initial OP found, prepare for transient

g.title: tran_check_delmin->tran_set_delta_to_delmin
g.text: Try one more time at delmin
